options.label: Bounded Abstract-Field Method Route
options.candidate_rule: Accept the exact twelve approved symbolic bridge records as sufficient bounded interpretation authority to prepare, under a later separately approved gate, a deterministic abstract-field method contract.
options.preserved_symbolic_rule: v = t; K80 at t = 0 and v = 0; N3 at t = 1 and v = 1
options.future_authority_if_selected: preparation only of a separate abstract-field method contract
known_risks: The future abstract field may be mathematically coherent while remaining unrelated to physical source placement.
Back and right data remain validation-only and cannot generate construction coordinates.
A later method must define exact between-trace and sector operations before sampling.
options.artifact_classification: authoritative selected bounded preparation route only

options.label: Preserve Source-Authority Block
options.candidate_rule: Do not authorize an abstract-field method route; retain the field block until approved physical source-to-target correspondence or another separately approved Blueprint rule exists.
known_risks: A005 cannot advance toward Step 10 closeout or Step 11 without new authority.
